name: New York Community Bancorp Inc. Depositary shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of Fixed-to-Floating Rate Series A Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: New York Community Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company with assets concentrated in multi-family lending. The company originates loans on multi-family properties, commercial real estate, and specialty finance. NYCB^A represents a series of preferred shares issued by the company.
